_comment: AoE3 DE live-memory model for Mode B capture. Signature, struct offsets, and resource decryption are reverse-engineered from github.com/SystematicSkid/Age-of-Empires-3-DE-Lua (Engine/Addresses.h, Player.h). These are version-specific: if `capture` reports 'signature not found' or a failed sanity check, they have drifted with a game patch — re-derive from an updated source or Cheat Engine and edit this file (no recompile needed). Resolution and the decrypt formula are documented in docs/mode-b-live-capture.md.
